title: Peeking Inside the Black Box: Visualizing Statistical Learning With Plots of Individual Conditional Expectation
venue: Journal of Computational and Graphical Statistics
search_query: Peeking Inside the Black Box: Visualizing Statistical Learning With Plots of Individual Conditional Expectation
notes: This article presents individual conditional expectation (ICE) plots, a tool for visualizing the model estimated by any supervised learning algorithm. Classical partial dependence plots (PDPs) help visualize the average partial relationship between the predicted response and one ...
